previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilized the sprint lane in the run to the finish.
Caught wide early and restrained to the rear of the field.
Commenced a trailing three-wide run from a rearward position leaving the 900m.
Restrained at the start to a rearward trailing position.
Shifted in and contacted a marker peg on the final corner.
Hung in and contacted a marker peg around the 1300m.
Hung in contacting a marker peg nearing the 1000m point.
